payload.answer: Compiled architecture decisions and open questions for Brain memory.
payload.decision: Commit durable architecture decisions for Brain: Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Preserve unresolved questions about Telegram and model selection as open questions rather than decisions.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; entities are represented by their supplied names.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain data, not the primary source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later as an additional Brain-related intake or integration channel.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating required performance for the Brain system.

details: Committed Brain DB as the source of truth.
Committed Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as a strict memory intake agent.
Preserved Telegram integration and cheapest performant model selection as unresolved open questions.
